title: Caramelized Norwegian Courgette Stir-fry
description: A fresh and tender weeknight dish featuring courgettes caramelized to perfection in a sugar-free-friendly stir-fry.

ingredients.name: Sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: Optional, for added crunch and flavor

instructions: Wash the courgettes thoroughly and cut them into thin, bite-sized pieces.
In a wok or large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and sesame seeds if using.
When the garlic turns golden brown, add the courgette slices and cook until they start to caramelize on one side (about 2-3 minutes).
Stir continuously to prevent burning, then flip the courgettes to caramelize them evenly. Cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Deglaze with a splash of water or white wine if desired, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan that will add extra depth of flavor and caramelization.

Once the mixture is well-coated in your cooking liquid, reduce the heat to low-medium. Continue to cook until all moisture has evaporated, leaving a slightly sticky, caramelized texture on the courgettes.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course with a protein of your choice.
